site.title: Jereme Hancock's Homepage
site.tagline: *** I'm just a guy who likes to tinker! ***
site.marquee: ★ Welcome to my corner of the web!  Check out my projects below!  Powered by caffeine and curiosity!  ★

profile.name: Jereme Hancock
profile.title: Software Developer @ Liquid Web
bio: Howdy, and welcome to my homepage! I'm Jereme — a software developer at Liquid Web who loves the whole process of building a solution and watching it come to life. I've spent years in web development, cloud management, and technical support, with a stop at Rackspace along the way.

I'm also the owner and developer behind Design Turtle, my web development shop running since 2004. When I'm not at work, I'm usually tinkering on side projects — Plex tools, homelab docs, and the occasional gloriously dumb web app. As I like to say: I'm just a guy who likes to tinker.

projects.title: Posteria
projects.description: A self-hosted Plex media poster management app for organizing and customizing the artwork across your library. My most-starred project!

projects.title: CLIX
projects.description: A Plex media player that lives right in your terminal. Browse and play your library without ever leaving the command line.

projects.title: Glimpse
projects.description: A lightweight Plex media viewer for browsing your collection through a clean, simple web interface.

projects.title: homelab.md
projects.description: Offline documentation for your homelab. Keep all your setup notes and configs handy even when the network is down.

projects.title: whoami-web
projects.description: A résumé that runs like a terminal — type commands to learn about me. A nerdier take on the classic CV.

projects.title: RandomGoat.com
projects.description: Exactly what it sounds like: a website that serves up random goat GIFs. Because the web needed more goats.
